close_reason: Created typescript-hello-deps example with lodash npm dependency
description:
Re-add typescript-hello and typescript-hello-deps examples that were removed in commit c1c6b2f.

Status:
- typescript-hello: DONE (already exists and works)
- typescript-hello-deps: Blocked on turnkey-hin6 (JS deps support in flake-parts)

The typescript-hello-deps example should demonstrate:
- Basic TS app with npm dependency (e.g., lodash or chalk)
- pnpm-lock.yaml and package.json
- js-deps.toml (generated by jsdeps-gen)
- Integration with jsdeps cell
title: Add TypeScript hello examples back once toolchain is functional
